creator: harlan@everett.org
text:
devel/libgsf aborted its upgrade (via portmaster) because
	XML::Parser was not installed.

Fix: 

Install p5-XML-Parser, restart portmaster.  Better still, list
	p5-XML-Parser as a dependency of devel/libgsf.
How-To-Repeat: 	Install an older version of libgsf, then upgrade to to the current
	version of libgsf.
